_description: CAPE (Shiller P/E) configuration for valuation-adjusted return estimates
_source: manual — update monthly from https://multpl.com/shiller-pe or FRED CAPE

readme.cape_current: Update monthly. Source: https://multpl.com/shiller-pe or FRED series CAPE
readme.cape_historical_mean: Long-run average ~17. Used as reversion target.
readme.adjustment_logic: Near-term mu dampened toward 1/CAPE real return. Long-term reverts to historical. See asset_calibration.py _cape_adjusted_mu() for full formula.
readme.auto_update: refresh_model.sh fetches from FRED when network available and updates this file.
